description_long: This axe features a striking, fantasy-inspired design with a golden bird motif forming the central body and wings, each wing edged with large, jagged silver blades. The bird's body is covered in scale-like patterns, and a blue gem is set at the center of its head, adding a decorative touch. The handle is segmented and wrapped with turquoise and gold bands, giving it a mystical, ornamental appearance. The bottom of the handle ends in a claw-like structure, echoing the avian theme. The overall construction appears robust, with the metallic blades and reinforced handle suggesting both decorative and functional intent. The axe's elaborate design makes it stand out as a ceremonial or fantasy weapon rather than a utilitarian tool.
description: A fantasy-themed axe with a golden bird motif, jagged silver blades, and a turquoise-banded handle ending in a claw-like base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full bird motif, both jagged silver blades, and the blue gem at the center.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the axe, with the blades and handle appearing narrow and the bird motif less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back of the bird motif and the symmetrical blade design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the thinness and layered construction of the axe.
attribute_handle_type: Segmented, slightly curved handle with turquoise and gold bands, likely wood core with decorative wrappings, rounded cross-section, ornamental grip.
attribute_blade_design: Twin jagged silver blades forming stylized bird wings, symmetrical, with pointed tips and a central decorative blue gem; no beard or poll, highly decorative.
attribute_mounting_style: Fantasy-styled integrated mounting, blades appear fused or cast as part of the bird motif, not traditional wedged or pinned.
